vocab.meaning: nghi thức đánh dấu bước ngoặt cuộc đời (trưởng thành)
vocab.example: Receiving a high-quality timepiece upon my graduation felt like a significant rite of passage into the professional world.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng bền vững để làm vật gia bảo
vocab.example: The watch my grandfather gave me is heirloom-quality, designed to be passed down through many more generations.
To me, this watch is the physical embodiment of my parents' hard work and their high expectations for my future.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ tìm thấy/bất ngờ nhận được
vocab.example: I didn't expect a gift that year, so I was thrilled to stumble upon a beautifully wrapped watch box on my desk.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò/yêu thích về thế giới đồng hồ
vocab.example: That gift actually sparked a lifelong horological curiosity in me, leading me to study how gears and springs function.
My former employer gave me a sleek digital watch as a gesture of goodwill when I completed my first major project.

vocab.meaning: ấn tượng về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: The watch was aesthetically striking, featuring a minimalist navy blue dial that caught everyone's eye.
My siblings made a communal effort to save up and buy me a luxury watch for my thirtieth birthday.
The unboxing experience was quite theatrical, as the watch was encased in a heavy, polished mahogany box.

vocab.meaning: vật bất ly thân/điều bất biến hàng ngày
vocab.example: Since receiving it, that watch has become a daily constant on my wrist, regardless of what I’m wearing.
